response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified two distinct musical segments. 
2. Song 1 (00:00-02:15) title appeared on-screen as '愛猫'. Performed by Kureiji Ollie & Anya Melfissa. 
3. Song 2 (02:16-04:55) title appeared as '絶頂讃歌'. Performed by Kureiji Ollie. Original artist identified as '和ぬか (WANUKA)'. 
4. Performed searches: ' "絶頂讃歌" 和ぬか Japanese and English lyrics'. Found full lyrics for Song 2. 
5. Search for ' "愛猫" Kureiji Ollie Anya Melfissa Japanese and English lyrics' did not yield direct lyrics for the song itself. Set lyrics to null for Song 1.
response.global_summary: A two-song musical performance by Kureiji Ollie of hololive ID, featuring a duet with Anya Melfissa on the first track and a solo performance on the second.

scenes.description: Kureiji Ollie and Anya Melfissa perform 'Ai-Neko' on a stage with neon heart motifs.
Kureiji Ollie performs a solo '絶頂讃歌' in a bedroom-themed stage setting.
scenes.song_title: 絶頂讃歌 (Zecchou Sanka / Orgasm Anthem)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Ah 願うは三度の絶頂を
胸の中で至る
零れる涙が飽和して
僕は今に果てる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, I wish for the climax of the third degree.
Reaching the climax inside my chest.
The spilling tears become saturated,
And I am dying in this moment.
